_comment: Project-level Claude Code config. Tracked in git so every session inherits the same safety guards + harness wiring. Per-machine state lives in .claude/skills, .claude/state, .claude/sessions etc. (gitignored).

Stop._comment: Activates the harness anamnesis loop on every session-end. Reads the .claude/hookify.anamnesis-*.local.md rules and runs reflection / error-learn / compound documentation. Without this, the symlinked rule files sit inert.
